What We Do

Professional cleaning,
personal service

Water-fed pole system with RO-purified water. No chemicals, no streaks. Just results.

01
Exterior Window Cleaning
Pure water fed through extended poles reaches every pane without ladders. Frames, sills, and screens included. Dries spotless every time.
Get a quote →
02
Interior Window Cleaning
Full inside access with protective floor covers. We treat your home carefully and leave zero mess behind. Honest, clean, professional.
Get a quote →
03
Solar Panel Cleaning
Dirty panels lose up to 25% efficiency. Purified water wash restores peak output safely without abrasives or chemicals that void warranties.
Get a quote →

Built in LA.
Show up every time.
No excuses.

Pacific Clear started because window cleaning in LA is either overpriced or underdelivered. We built our own setup water-fed poles, RO/DI filtration, zero ppm and we show up to every job treating it like our reputation depends on it. Because it does. You talk to the owner. No call centers. We're done when you're satisfied.
Owner-operated
You call us directly. No middlemen, no runaround, no strangers.
Professional gear
Water-fed poles + RO/DI system reaching 0 ppm. Same tech as the big outfits, personal service.
100% satisfaction
Not done until you're happy. We re-do the job free if something isn't right.
